conservative.name: Harmonic Convergence
conservative.requirements: 5 power. If you are engaged with an enemy, add L to the dice pool

success.description: A nimbus of blue light flares from your outstretched hand, then fades. You cast the spell
As above, and add 2 recharge tokens to this spell

boon.description: Add or remove 1 recharge token from a Celestial Order spell

bane.description: Effect: Events simply work out in favor of you and your allies. While this spell is recharging, any member of your party may remove a recharge token from this card to remove to the results pool of any of his checks. He may do this only once per check

boon.description: Effect: Events simply work out in favor of you and your allies. While this spell is recharging, any member of your party may remove a recharge token from this card to add to the results pool of any of his checks. He may do this only once per check
Add or remove 1 recharge token from a Celestial Order spell

chaosStar.description: Anyone, friend or foe, can trigger this spell's effect (but your enemies suffer 1 stress each time they do it)
